_meta: Scene blueprint — read by animation_engine.py and frame_generator.py

dialogue.line: Dandelion root, Uva Ursi, Buchu leaf — all natural herbal ingredients working together to help your body shed that water weight fast.

frame.MrWilly_pose: standing right of frame, arms open wide in impressed gesture, nodding slowly, leaning back slightly
frame.MrWilly_expression: genuinely impressed, eyebrows raised, open mouth slight smile
frame.Xpel_pose: standing on table left of frame, chest puffed out proudly, one tiny arm bent pointing at itself
frame.Xpel_expression: maximum pride, confident squinted happy eyes, big smile

camera_motion.movement: very slow pan from Xpel to MrWilly and back, settling centered

character_motion.MrWilly: slow impressed nod, arms sway open slightly wider, weight shifts back, breathing visible
character_motion.Xpel: tiny arm gestures while speaking, chest stays puffed, feet do small proud shuffle — no spinning, no particles, no glow
